title: glandora goulandrisiorum subsp. thessalica
intro: Glandora goulandrisiorum subsp. thessalica is a rare and endangered plant species native to Greece, belonging to the Borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in the treatment of various health issues. Its health benefits include relieving digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Glandora goulandrisiorum subsp. thessalica can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
